position_applied_for.position_s_applied_for: CDL Class A Regional Flatbed Driver
position_applied_for.how_did_you_hear_about_this_job: I first heard about Pacific Coast Transportation Services through a former coworker, Daniel Ruiz, who now works as a dispatcher at your Sacramento terminal. He spoke very highly of the company’s safety culture, the condition of the equipment, and the consistency of the regional routes. After that conversation, I went to your company website and reviewed the careers section in detail, then also saw the same CDL Class A Regional Flatbed Driver position posted on Indeed. I decided to apply directly through your company’s website because I prefer to have my application go straight into the company system rather than through a third-party job board. Daniel encouraged me to mention that we worked together at Golden State Freight Lines from 2018 to 2021 and that he thought my safety record and work ethic would be a good fit here.

personal_information.previous_address_2: 910 East Shields Avenue, Apt B, Fresno, CA 93704
